description: Create a dynamic NIBRS dictation system for Talon Voice in %APPDATA%\Talon\user\nibrs_dictation\ using data from C:\workspace\data\nibrs_offenses.csv. The system must implement a Talon list 'user.nibrs_offense' mapping normalized spoken forms of the 'Offense Name' to their 'Offense Code'. Normalization requires converting names to lowercase, removing special characters, and replacing '/' or '&' with spaces. The implementation must include a Python module (nibrs.py) defining the list and a custom action 'get_nibrs_name(code: str)' that returns the original, unmodified name. A Talon command file (nibrs.talon) must provide two commands: 'charge {user.nibrs_offense}' to insert the offense code, and 'charge full {user.nibrs_offense}' to insert the code followed by a hyphen and the original name.
